event: Early morning landscape view of Adams and St. Helen's
description: A delicate watercolor landscape showing a snow-capped mountain peak rising above layers of misty blue hills and valleys. The mountain appears pale and ethereal against a soft sky. The foreground consists of green and blue-gray terrain with sparse vegetation. The entire composition is rendered in soft, washed-out tones of blue, lavender, white, and pale green, creating an impression of early morning light and atmospheric haze. Handwritten text appears in the corners.

_meta.title: Adams and St. Helen's, Early Morning
